name: Spiced Fig Drop Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Stewed California dried figs (drained and cut up)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and both sugars until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in the drained, cut-up stewed figs.
4. Sift together the flour and all dry ingredients (baking powder, baking soda, allspice, cinnamon).
5. Gradually add the sifted mixture to the cookie dough, stirring until just combined.
6. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto buttered cookie sheets.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 11 minutes, or until brown and firm to touch.
8. Cool on wire racks before storing in an airtight container.
Note: A stone crock will make the cookies too moist.
